flow.name: exp-list-customers-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP List Customers Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: returns all customers with consumer-friendly response shaping

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to list all customers

http:request.doc:name: GET customers → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to customers-orders-prc-api to retrieve all customers

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-get-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Get Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: returns a single customer by ID with consumer-friendly error responses

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to retrieve a specific customer

http:request.doc:name: GET customer → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to customers-orders-prc-api for single customer lookup

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-get-customer-orders-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Get Customer Orders Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: returns all orders for a customer

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}/orders
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to list a customer's orders

http:request.doc:name: GET customer orders → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api to retrieve all orders for the customer

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-get-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Get Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: returns a specific order scoped to a customer

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to retrieve a specific order for a customer

http:request.doc:name: GET order → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which validates ownership and returns the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

logger.message: #['[exp-api] GET /customers/' ++ vars.customerId ++ '/orders/' ++ vars.orderId ++ ' → prc returned ' ++ vars.httpStatus]

flow.name: exp-create-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Create Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: creates a new customer and returns 201 Created with the created resource

http:listener.doc:name: POST /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to create a new customer

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-update-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Update Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: updates a customer and returns updated resource or consumer-friendly 404

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to update an existing customer

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-delete-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Delete Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: deletes a customer — process layer enforces no-orders guard and returns 409 Conflict if orders exist

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to delete a customer; 409 returned if active orders exist

http:request.doc:name: DELETE customer → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which checks for orders before deleting

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status — 204 if deleted, 409 if orders exist, 404 if not found

logger.doc:description: Logs customer delete result including business rule outcome

flow.name: exp-create-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Create Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: creates a new order for a customer — process layer validates customer exists

http:listener.doc:name: POST /customers/{customerId}/orders
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to create a new order for a customer

http:request.doc:name: POST order → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which validates the customer and creates the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

flow.name: exp-update-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Update Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: updates an order — process layer validates ownership

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to update an order; prc layer validates ownership

http:request.doc:name: PUT order → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which validates ownership and applies the update

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status from process API response

logger.message: #['[exp-api] PUT /customers/' ++ vars.customerId ++ '/orders/' ++ vars.orderId ++ ' → prc returned ' ++ vars.httpStatus]
